title: Crossword Puzzle
description: Solve crossword puzzles using word definitions as clues.

title: Word Scramble
description: Unscramble the letters to find the hidden word.

title: Hangman
description: Guess the word one letter at a time before the drawing is complete.

title: Spelling Quiz
description: Listen to the word and type the correct spelling.

title: Matching Game
description: Match words with their correct definitions.

title: Fill in the Blank
description: Complete the sentence by choosing the right word.
